data.title: Zero Trust Security
data.description: Trust nothing by default, verify everything continuously to secure data and systems.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensuring that data is encrypted in transit and at rest to protect sensitive information.

data.title: Threat Intelligence
data.description: Gathering and analyzing information about potential threats to preemptively address vulnerabilities.

data.title: Secure Access Service Edge (SASE)
data.description: Consolidating network security and WAN capabilities into a cloud-delivered service model.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: A detailed plan for identifying, managing, and recovering from security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Incident Response teams, protocols like NIST SP 800-61
